title: Harden RnS watcher against hung resumes
description: A hung hcom r subprocess can crash the persistent RnS limit watcher, leaving auto-resume inactive until manual restart. Catch resume timeouts/failures as failed nudges, continue polling, and make health expose dead or stale watcher pidfiles.
acceptance_criteria: send_nudge returns false instead of raising when hcom r times out
poll_once records failed nudge events and the watcher process keeps running after a hung resume
Command center RnS health can distinguish stale/dead watcher pidfile from normal warning state
